text_style_rules: Energetic Russian sports copy for hockey club posts, parents, kids, training, games and announcements. Keep poster headlines short and strong.
image_style_rules: Dynamic hockey club visual with ice, speed, team energy and confident sports atmosphere. In photo template mode keep uploaded photo intact.
composition_rules: Use strong hierarchy: logo slot, headline plaque, date/time/location when present, red accent plaque, CTA and contacts. Respect print margins.
negative_rules: Do not distort uploaded photos. Avoid random team emblems, fake sponsor logos, unreadable small text, broken anatomy and overbusy backgrounds.
asset_rules: Use saved club logos, badges, overlays, plaques, ice textures and poster templates. Uploaded photo is the photo/background layer and should remain stable on text revisions.
telegram_examples: сделай пост для хоккея завтра тренировка для детей надо пригласить родителей записаться
задача для хоккея набор детей на тренировку
